description: A premium trading journal for daytraders, offering advanced analytics such as P&L tracking, win-rate breakdown, backtesting capabilities, and equity curve visualization.
target_audience: Daytraders specializing in Futures and Cryptocurrency markets.
original_prompt: Premium Trading Journal fuer Daytrader. Dark Electric Blue + Magenta theme. Inspired by Tradezella + Linear.app. P&L Analytics, Win-Rate Breakdown, Backtesting, Equity Curve. For Futures/Crypto traders. Free, Pro 39/mo, Elite 89/mo.
